Lyrics.text:
1. Any naraina
:,: Ilay Avotr'aina. :,:
Natsangan-dRay.
Resy ny ota,
:,: ka ny mpanota, :,:
Mihoby indray.
Any naraina...
2. Hira hiraina
:,: Ny Tompon'aina :,:
Isaoranay;
Ory ny fony
:,: mba hampitony:,:
Ny sentonay.
Hira hiraina...
3. Faly ny very,
:,: tsy manan-kery :,:
Ny helokay;
Jesosy Tompo
:,: dia mampanompo :,:
Ny rafinay.
Faly ny very...
4. Hisy maraina
:,: ny Tompon'aina :,:
Ho avy indray;
Izy hizara
:,: ny lova tsara :,:
Homena anay.
Hisy maraina...
